transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today,
I have cheese pork cutlet
These are in trend right now
There wasn't 1 near me
So I found 1 near Hapjung station (Maru Donkatsu)
And I got it delivered
The owner wrote me a note on the beverage bottle
"Tzuyang, I'm a fan. The drink is on me"
I think he figured from my voice
I mean, who else orders this much?
I'll heat them up 4 at a time
Let's cook the cream soup first
Let's add the corn
Corn soup
Let's sprinkle some black pepper

What was that explosion?
The cheese got cooked like a pizza
Just like a pizza
That looks good
Look at this
Bon appetit
The soup is tasty
The consistency is perfect
It's very nice
Let's warm up with the soup first
It's really delicious
The inside is cooked
I'm hoping for a cheese pull
So good
It's very tender Amazing
The ones that look like this are so much better than the regular ones

I heated up again, so the outside is not that crispy
The right way is to dine-in
Let's dip it in their signature sauce
The cheese is
It's amazing
I have a curry sauce here too
The curry tastes so good
Crazy! Let's get some kimchi
You can't go wrong with this
Let's eat the soup while we wait
I'm not setting a timer for the air fryer I just look
It tastes really good
How does the Ottogi (brand) soup taste this good?
The beef one is the best
I finished it already
Can cheese taste different? Don't they use the same type of cheese?

Why's this cheese so different?
Dip it in the sauce
The curry sauce is really good too
So yummy
The sauce is great
This one's big too
So good
Kimchi on top
This isn't enough food Should I cook something?
It tastes better cold
Hurry and cook Let's eat while we wait
You know the pork meat inside this?
It's really tender and tasty
And the cheese is amazing
Dip in the sauce
Let's dip it in the soup

Perfect
It feels like it's better with cooked cheese I'm not too sure
This is it!
Hot
This is a thumbnail
Pork Cutlet sauce
Wait, I mean curry It's really good
I want to heat it up but I'm scared of the explosion
It exploded earlier
I'm going to eat it as it is
I think that's the best option
It's still delicious
Check out the sound
Oh no! That's too much sauce
This is the regular pork cutlet
Tender

I asked which one was better: The sirloin or the tenderloin And he said that the tenderloin is more tender
It's definitely different than the sirloin pork cutlet
I'm eating a lot slower now, right?
The roof of my mouth hurts
It scratched it
My poor mouth
It hurts
I almost coughed
Last piece
Thanks everyone~
